role_title: Growth Merchant Lead - Emerging Markets Colorado

location.office_time_required: 70%+ field travel; some time working remotely

level_signals: 4+ years of in-person, outside B2B sales experience required
Operates autonomously and creates the playbook
OTE range $156K–$230K consistent with senior individual contributor field sales

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 4+ years of in-person, outside B2B sales experience (field experience is required)
You have proven success running short, high-velocity, full sales cycles – including same-day closes.
You have strong prospecting, hunting, and negotiation skills.
You are energized by extensive travel – spending 70%+ of your time in the field, including overnight travel inside and outside of your home state.
You have demonstrated success operating autonomously and thrive in environments where you will create the playbook, not follow one.
You are comfortable using Salesforce, Google Workspace, and sales productivity tools.
You are entrepreneurial, adaptable, and motivated building and scaling new markets.

scope.surface: Emerging Markets field sales — T4–T5 geographies in Colorado; SMB restaurants and retailers
scope.business_model: marketplace / on-demand delivery; revenue-share agreements with merchants
core_responsibilities: Expand DoorDash's presence by traveling to emerging markets and developing new restaurant partnerships.
Lead end-to-end, in-person sales cycles– prospecting, pitching, negotiating, and closing.
Sell business owners on DoorDash's value and secure revenue-share agreements.
Consistently execute high-volume field activity and close deals within days.
Build scalable approaches and playbooks to accelerate market expansion.
Shape DoorDash's expansion strategy in rural economies.

compensation.equity_form: equity grants mentioned in addition to base and sales commission

green_flags: Full compensation range disclosed: base $93,840–$138,000 and OTE $156,400–$230,000
Equity grants mentioned in addition to commission
Clear role scope and mission — highest-priority company initiative (T4–T5 expansion)
Explicit career development and ownership culture highlighted
Comprehensive benefits including 16 weeks paid parental leave, 401(k) match, wellness benefits
Applications accepted on an ongoing basis — no hard deadline pressure
Strong D&I commitment and inclusive hiring practices stated
red_flags: Requires 70%+ travel including overnight — significant lifestyle constraint
Must live near a major airport — geographic constraint not tied to a specific city office
No remote-only option; primarily field-based with only some remote flexibility
Role focuses exclusively on rural/emerging T4–T5 markets which may limit long-term growth within the same geography

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years required + OTE range)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (not stated in JD; inferred from responsibilities)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and revenue-share language)
location.type (inferred as hybrid — field 70%+ with some remote time; no traditional office mandate)
ambiguities: Location is described as 'Colorado' and 'proximity to a major airport' but no specific city is named; cities_listed set to ['Colorado'] as region-level identifier

The JD notes base pay range applies to Illinois and Colorado specifically but the role is Colorado-focused — it is unclear whether Illinois is also a valid work location for this role or just a pay transparency disclosure state
Visa sponsorship is not addressed anywhere in the JD
